LevelTimeData.des: Time's up, tiemVideo watch a video to recover 60s

StepCfg.des: Move limit defaults to 5 per level; when used up, watch a video to add 5 moves

share.des: Time's-up screen; the share button hides after N successful shares, -1 means always present, N means hide after N successful shares

AutoAddDesktopWTR.desc: 7-day check-in screen checks add-to-desktop by default, switch.iosOpen: iOS switch

params.desc1: signToAddDest: 1 7-day check-in screen shows add-to-desktop checkbox    0 hides it
params.desc2: iosOpen: 1 iOS shows add-to-desktop checkbox, 0 iOS hides add-to-desktop checkbox

CoinConfig._desc_addForAdWin: addForAdWin: (coins from a win multiplied by N, win*winByAd)
CoinConfig._desc_addForHomeShare: addForHomeShare: (coins gained by sharing on the win screen)
CoinConfig._desc_addForFailShare: addForFailShare: (coins gained by sharing on the fail screen)
CoinConfig._desc_costBySkin: costBySkin: coins spent on a skin
CoinConfig._desc_costByPropCat: costByPropCat: coins spent on the in-game Find-Cat item
CoinConfig._desc_costByPropFangdajing: costByPropFangdajing: coins spent on the in-game hint item.

Type9GameOtherConfig.LvBloodMaxExtra_des: Main level max health, extra config
Type9GameOtherConfig.noCostEnergyLevelMax_des: First N levels don't deduct energy, controlled by OSS, default 5
Type9GameOtherConfig.hideWinFailViewBackBtnLevelMax_des: Hide the back-to-home button on win/fail screens for the first N levels
Type9GameOtherConfig.isHandGmOpen_des: Gesture to open the test and GM panel switch
Type9GameOtherConfig.type9LevelCount_des: Type9 per-level config count, used for Extreme Challenge random levels and Daily Challenge; remember to update the count here when changing level config
Type9GameOtherConfig.blockColorType_des: Cell color type, 1: old colors, 2: new colors

Type9AbConfig.keyMap_des: abkey for the field, format: 'fieldName':[key, ab default]
Type9AbConfig.valueMap_des: ab values for the field, format: 'fieldName':{'1':value1,'2':value2}

bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.des: Bottom button floating hint config (button1=magnifier, button2=Find Cat)
bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.isOpen_des: Master switch; when false, no bottom button hints trigger
bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.interval_des: Trigger a hint once after this many idle seconds
bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.firstShowBtnCtrl_des: Priority button on first hint trigger: 0 random, 1 magnifier, 2 Find Cat (falls back automatically if the button can't hint)
bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.btnTipsCtrl_des: Magnifier button hint type switch; if both hint types are false, this button hint won't trigger
bottomBtnFloatTipsConfig.btnFindCatCtrl_des: Find-Cat button hint type switch; if both hint types are false, this button hint won't trigger

btnTipsCtrl.text_des: Whether to show text hint (original hint)

btnFindCatCtrl.text_des: Whether to show text hint (original hint)

challengeConfig.enableNeedPassLv_des: Which main-line level to clear to unlock Extreme Challenge, moved to guideToChallengeConfig.survivalChallengeEnableNeedPassLv
challengeConfig.timeConfig_des: Extreme Challenge in-level time add/subtract config
challengeConfig.rowColInit_des: Extreme Challenge random level initial side length
challengeConfig.rowColAddPerLevel_des: Extreme Challenge random level side length increase per level
challengeConfig.rowColMax_des: Extreme Challenge random level max side length
challengeConfig.excludeLevelId_des: Level IDs to exclude from Extreme Challenge random levels
challengeConfig.addEnergyConfig_des: Extreme Challenge rewards energy by completed rounds (completed rounds >= config key)
challengeConfig.timeRebirthCanUse_des: Extreme Challenge revive button usable count
challengeConfig.survivalChallengeLevelCount_des: Extreme Challenge per-level config count, used for random levels; if set here it's read here, otherwise type9LevelCount

dayChallengeConfig.enableNeedPassLv_des: Which main-line level to clear to unlock Daily Challenge, moved to guideToChallengeConfig.dayChallengeEnableNeedPassLv
dayChallengeConfig.useLevelConfig_des: Level config used by Daily Challenge; level count uses type9LevelCount
dayChallengeConfig.initTimestamp_des: Daily Challenge start-day timestamp (ms); the day's levelId is decided by the number of days relative to this time
dayChallengeConfig.timeConfig_des: Daily Challenge in-level time add/subtract config
dayChallengeConfig.timeRebirthCanUse_des: Daily Challenge revive button usable count
dayChallengeConfig.rebirthAddHp_des: Daily Challenge revive button health gain
dayChallengeConfig.adWinAddEnergy_des: Daily Challenge ad energy bonus multiplier
dayChallengeConfig.isShowHardAlert_des: Daily Challenge hard-level reminder animation switch
dayChallengeConfig.newHandLevelIdList_des: New users get fixed first n levels in Daily Challenge, Zentao-6402

dayChallengeAbConfig.des: Daily Challenge AB test config; when set, levels are read in a fixed order
dayChallengeAbConfig.default_des: Default value when no AB test is configured

randomReuseConfig.des: Config for randomly reusing levels after the main levels run out
randomReuseConfig.randomReuseKeyMax_des: Max value of N in random-reuse level config 88_N_M
randomReuseConfig.randomReuseStepSize_des: Max value of M in random-reuse level 88_N_M

continuousWinConfig.getRewardNeedWinCount_des: Win streak required to claim the streak reward
continuousWinConfig.recoveryAdNeedCount_des: Number of ads to watch to restore the win streak
continuousWinConfig.noAddContinuousWinLevelMax_des: First N levels don't count toward the win streak, default 0

findCatLockConfig.des: Find-Cat button unlock config; there's an unlock guide on unlock
findCatLockConfig.specialUnLockWithlevelOrderN_des: Special handling: which level unlocks Order N; orders without special config read unLockLevel, format [Order N, unlock level]

guideToChallengeConfig.des: Win screen popup guides to New Mode-Daily Challenge/Extreme Challenge
guideToChallengeConfig.default_des: Default value when no AB test is configured
